text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 38 

BNDLD_ADJSTMT_AMT 

LABEL: Bundled Payment Adjustment Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This field represents the amount (rounded to whole dollars) the claim was reduced by. This field only 
applies to providers participating in the CMMI model 1 bundled payment program and the adjustment is 
calculated off the base operating DRG amount field. 

SHORT NAME: BNDLD_ADJSTMT_AMT 

LONG NAME: BNDLD_ADJSTMT_AMT
